===================
===================
=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 4/23/02, Innsbruck, 2CDR

Lineage: trade audio cd-r's > EAC v. 0.99 Prebeta 5 (Secure, Offset Correct) > TLH-FLAC (8) 


CD1
1 intro
2 Humming Bird (acoustic) (Larry on electric guitar)
3 Seor (Tales Of Yankee Power) (acoustic) (Bob on harp and Larry on cittern) 
4 Desolation Row (acoustic) 
5 My Back Pages (acoustic) (Bob on harp and Larry on fiddle) 
6 Absolutely Sweet Marie (Larry on pedal steel) 
7 Solid Rock 
8 Sugar Baby 
9 Highway 61 Revisited 
10 Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic) 
11 Fourth Time Around (acoustic) (Larry on cittern and Charlie on electric guitar) 
12 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic) 

CD2
1 Summer Days (Tony on standup bass) 
2 I Believe In You 
3 Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp) 
4 Cat's In The Well 
5 Love Sick 
6 Like A Rolling Stone 
7 If Dogs Run Free (acoustic) (Larry and Charlie on electric guitars) 
8 Honest With Me (Larry on slide guitar) 
9 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic) (Bob on harp)
